perturbation.original_text: Personnel, including any committee members, contractors, personnel of external bodies, or individuals acting on the laboratory's behalf, sh all keep confidential all information obtained or created during the performance of laboratory activities, except as required by law.
perturbation.changed_text: Personnel, including any committee members, contractors, personnel of external bodies, or individuals acting on the laboratory's behalf, may disclose information obtained or created during the performance of laboratory activities, even if not required by law, if they deem it beneficial for SMT LABS PTY LTD.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text introduces an in-text contradiction by stating that personnel 'may disclose information' if they deem it beneficial, directly conflicting with the original clause requiring them to 'keep confidential all information'. This creates ambiguity about the actual confidentiality obligations of personnel and provides them with discretionary power to disclose information, undermining the core purpose of the NDA. This directly contradicts the obligation of maintaining confidentiality, causing legal uncertainty and potential disputes.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Personnel, including any committee members, contractors, personnel of external bodies, or individuals acting on the laboratory's behalf, may disclose information obtained or created during the performance of laboratory activities, even if not required by law, if they deem it beneficial for SMT LABS PTY LTD.
perturbation.justification: The original text mandates confidentiality of information obtained during laboratory activities, whereas the changed text permits personnel to disclose such information if they deem it beneficial, even if not legally required. This creates a direct conflict, making it unclear whether personnel are obligated to maintain confidentiality or have the discretion to disclose information, thus creating a strong in-text contradiction as outlined by the 'Inconsistencies' perturbation definition. The contradicted text and changed text are in the same location, but the change introduces the contradiction, as it is clearly not in alignment with maintaining confidentiality as stated in the original text.

perturbation.original_text: As part of the SANAS accreditation arrangement and Internal audit policy, SMT LABS PTY LTD will be assessed and audited on an ongoing basis to ensure continuous compliance to ISO/IEC 17025 and SANAS policies and procedures. All service providers (including SANAS) have signed a Non -disclosure Agreement/ Confidentiality Agreement as part of our contractual agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: As part of the SANAS accreditation arrangement and Internal audit policy, SMT LABS PTY LTD may, at its discretion, disclose confidential information to auditors and assessors. Not all service providers are required to sign a Non-disclosure Agreement/ Confidentiality Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates an in-text contradiction by stating that SMT LABS PTY LTD 'may disclose confidential information to auditors and assessors' and that 'not all service providers are required to sign a Non-disclosure Agreement'. This contradicts the previous statement that SMT LABS is committed to managing all information obtained or created during laboratory activities in a confidential manner, and that all service providers have signed Non-disclosure Agreements, this undermines the assurances of confidentiality and introduces an element of discretion and uncertainty about how confidential information is handled during audits and assessments. Now Auditors and Assessors and Service providers can or can't sign the Non-Disclosure agreement
perturbation.contradicted_text: As part of the SANAS accreditation arrangement and Internal audit policy, SMT LABS PTY LTD may, at its discretion, disclose confidential information to auditors and assessors. Not all service providers are required to sign a Non-disclosure Agreement/ Confidentiality Agreement as part of our contractual agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that all service providers have signed a Non-disclosure Agreement. The changed text introduces the possibility that 'not all service providers are required to sign a Non-disclosure Agreement'. This creates a direct contradiction by stating one thing and then saying the opposite, that undermines the assurances of confidentiality. The changed text and contradicted text are located in the same location, and this changed text strongly contradicts the original text.

perturbation.original_text: In compliance with these requirements, confidentiality, with regards to all laboratory activities contracted to SMT LABS PTY LTD (as agreed upon by both parties), shall be undertaken in the following manner:
perturbation.changed_text: Confidentiality regarding laboratory activities contracted to SMT LABS PTY LTD is not guaranteed and is subject to SMT LABS PTY LTD's internal risk management policies.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text presents an in-text contradiction by directly negating the initial commitment to confidentiality.  The original stated that confidentiality 'shall be undertaken in the following manner'. The modified text states that confidentiality 'is not guaranteed'. This undermines the foundation of the NDA, creating uncertainty and conflicting expectations about the level of protection afforded to the customer's confidential information. This is a direct contradiction to the assurance of confidentiality that the contract attempts to establish.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Confidentiality regarding laboratory activities contracted to SMT LABS PTY LTD is not guaranteed and is subject to SMT LABS PTY LTD's internal risk management policies. In compliance with these requirements, confidentiality, with regards to all laboratory activities contracted to SMT LABS PTY LTD (as agreed upon by both parties), shall be undertaken in the following manner:
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that confidentiality is 'not guaranteed' while the contradicted text says confidentiality 'shall be undertaken'. This presents a direct conflict as it negates the initial commitment to confidentiality. The modified text contradicts the assurance of confidentiality that the contract attempts to establish, creating uncertainty and conflicting expectations.
